selected_important_turn.text: I get really cold at night so I'd like to have extra firewood.
selected_important_turn.why_important: This is the first substantive move about items and it shifts the interaction from the opponent's cooperative information-seeking into a self-focused demand. It sets a zero-sum tone early and strongly signals competition just when the other party was inviting cooperation.
selected_important_turn.why_improvable_or_worth_amplifying: The turn offers a personal need but is framed as a unilateral claim/demand rather than as part of a trade-off. It misses an opportunity to turn shared needs into integrative options (e.g., proposing what you can give in return or asking the opponent about tradeable items). As a result it narrows options and risks making the other side defensive.
selected_important_turn.better_direction: Keep the personal justification but pair it with a cooperative move: ask their priorities/constraints, propose concrete trade options (e.g., "I need extra firewood — would you accept extra food/water in exchange?") or offer something you can give in return. Signal willingness to find a mutually acceptable split rather than only asking for more.

expected_effect_on_negotiation.joint_gain: increase — creating trade proposals would open integrative possibilities instead of zero-sum demands
expected_effect_on_negotiation.fairness: increase — a trade-framed request makes outcomes feel more balanced
expected_effect_on_negotiation.ease_of_agreement: increase — cooperative wording and concrete trade options make it easier to reach agreement
expected_effect_on_negotiation.relationship: improve — showing willingness to trade builds trust and goodwill

value2reason.Low: I will drinking water from the stream so i won't need so much water
value2reason.Medium: I will be alone so I don't need too much food.
value2reason.High: I plan to keep the fire going all night so I need a lot of firewood.

value2reason.Low: I am skinny so I do not eat much.
value2reason.Medium: I don't want to get dehydrated.

dialogue.text: Hello there I'm well. How about yourself?
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: I'm good. I'm excited for the camping trip. I have been planning this for a few weeks. I'm excited to get out into the woods.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: Oh great! I love getting out into nature.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: Do you have any preferences in regards to the firewood, food, and water? I would like us both to get what we need.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: I get really cold at night so I'd like to have extra firewood.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: I understand the importance of firewood. Since I need a lot of it for the fire, how about I take 2 packages of firewood, and you can have 1? For the rest, we can split the food and water fairly.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: I need extra firewood — would you accept extra food or water in exchange? I value firewood highly, but I’m open to trade if it helps us both get what we need.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: I'm willing to trade 1 package of food for 1 package of firewood. That way, I get more firewood for the fire, and you get some food. What do you think?
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: I need 2 more firewood packages to stay warm. If you give me 1 food package, I’ll give you 1 water package as a fair trade. Let’s make sure we both have what we need.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: I'm okay with trading 1 food for 1 firewood, and 1 water for 1 food. That way, I get 3 firewood, you get 2 food, and we both have water. Let's agree on this split.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: Let me check the numbers again. If I get 3 firewood, you get 2 food, and we both have water, that works for me. Let’s confirm this split and move on.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: Deal confirmed! I'll take 3 firewood, you get 2 food, and we both have 1 water. Safe and warm camping ahead! 😊
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: The deal has already been confirmed. I am leaving now.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2
